scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../cart-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:cart" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:user"
